gist.headline: New bloom: LAHgen
gist.blurb: A new app has sprouted in the greenhouse! LAHgen uses Pollinations to generate unlimited AI images across tons of artistic styles.
gist.summary: Added LAHgen, a text-to-image generation app, to the community showcase and greenhouse directories.
gist.impact: The community directory now features LAHgen, highlighting another creative way developers are using our image generation API.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee as an artist in the greenhouse. Since LAHgen is an image generator with different artistic styles, Polly should be wearing a painter's beret and watering a canvas or easel that is blooming with colorful pixel art paintings.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, watering a glowing lime green (#ecf874) easel that is sprouting beautiful pixelated paintings like flowers. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
